name: implementation-strategy
default_program:
[stages: preflight>detect>analyze>plan>review>handoff>audit |
 scope: repo|diff|paths(glob,...) |
 policy: evidence,quality-gates{compat,docs},deterministic-output |
 lens: hickey-carmack |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: CHANGE_INTENT
required_inputs.description: The behavior or interface that is about to change.

required_inputs.name: RELEASE_BOUNDARY_HINT
required_inputs.description: Known latest release boundary when already established.

required_inputs.name: CONSTRAINTS
required_inputs.description: Compatibility, rollout, migration, or user constraints.
